leadText: The Wonder Launcher (Japanese: ミラクルシューター Miracle Shooter) is a multiplayer battle feature only available in Generation V.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] If both players have the Wonder Launcher enabled during a multiplayer battle, they will be able to purchase the use of certain items using points that are accumulated each turn. During Wonder Launcher battles, the player characters have alternate sprites. The Wonder Launcher itself is something worn around the wrist, similarly to the Fine Styler , and shoots items in the form of discs at a Pokémon during battle. Wonder Launcher items [ edit | edit source ] Unlike in-game battles, the player cannot use items from their Bag ; instead, there is a select set of items available to the player, including several items exclusive to the Wonder Launcher. Each item has a certain point value which must be paid in order to use the item. At the start of their turn, the player gains one point to use or accumulate, or two points if the player is in a Triple Battle and has fewer than three Pokémon on their side of the field. A player cannot have more than 14 points. Wonder Launcher items are often simply different versions of regular items such as Potions , Revives , and battle items like X Attacks . However, there are also new items, such as upgraded versions of battle items, indicated by the number in their name; for example, X Defend 2 is an upgraded version of an X Defense . X Attack プラスパワー PlusPower ITEMS pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Raises the Attack of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 An item that raises the Attack stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn. Note: Costs 3 points to use X Attack 2 プラスパワー２ PlusPower 2 ITEMS pocket ONLY IN GEN V Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Raises the Attack of a Pokémon currently in battle by 2 levels. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 It sharply raises the Attack stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn. S V Sharply boosts the Attack stat of a Pokémon in battle. This effect disappears if the Pokémon leaves the battle. Note: Costs 5 points to use X Attack 3 プラスパワー３ PlusPower 3 ITEMS pocket ONLY IN GEN V Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Raises the Attack of a Pokémon currently in battle by 3 levels. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 It drastically raises the Attack stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn. S V Drastically boosts the Attack stat of a Pokémon in battle. This effect disappears if the Pokémon leaves the battle. S V Can be used many times to boost a Pokémon's critical- hit [ sic ] ratio. These effects disappear if the Pokémon leaves the battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn. S V Can be used many times to greatly boost a Pokémon's critical-hit ratio. These effects disappear if the Pokémon leaves the battle. Note: Costs 7 points to use Guard Spec. エフェクトガード Effect Guard ITEMS pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Prevents stat reduction by opponents' moves for the user's party for five turns. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 An item that prevents stat reduction among the Trainer's party Pokémon for five turns after use. Note: Costs 3 points to use Reset Urge フラットコール Flat Call ITEMS pocket ONLY IN GEN V Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Eliminates all changes to the ally's stats . Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 When used, it restores any stat changes of an ally Pokémon. S V When used, it removes any stat changes of an ally Pokémon. Note: Costs 9 points to use Item Urge アイテムコール Item Call ITEMS pocket ONLY IN GEN V Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Activates the effect of the ally's held item. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 When used, it causes an ally Pokémon to use its held item. Note: Costs 1 point to use Item Drop アイテムドロップ Item Drop ITEMS pocket ONLY IN GEN V Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Removes the ally's held item for the remainder of the battle. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 When used, it causes an ally Pokémon to drop a held item. Note: Costs 5 points to use Ability Urge スキルコール Skill Call ITEMS pocket ONLY IN GEN V Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Activates the effect of the ally's Ability . This only applies to the available Abilities that activate upon entering battle ( Anticipation , Download , Drizzle , Drought , Forecast , Forewarn , Frisk , Intimidate , Sand Stream , Slow Start , Snow Warning , and Trace ). Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 When used, it activates the Ability of an ally Pokémon. Note: Costs 3 points to use Potion キズぐすり Wound Medicine MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Heals a Pokémon by 20 HP. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine for wounds. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by just 20 points. Note: Costs 2 points to use Super Potion いいキズぐすり Good Wound Medicine MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Heals a Pokémon by 50 HP. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine for wounds. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 50 points. Note: Costs 4 points to use Hyper Potion すごいキズぐすり Amazing Wound Medicine MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Heals a Pokémon by 200 HP. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine for wounds. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 200 points. Note: Costs 8 points to use Max Potion まんたんのくすり Tank-Filling Medicine MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Heals a Pokémon to its full HP. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine for wounds. It completely restores the HP of a single Pokémon. Note: Costs 10 points to use Full Restore かいふくのくすり Recovery Medicine MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Heals a Pokémon to its full HP and restores all status conditions . Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A medicine that fully restores the HP and heals any status problems of a single Pokémon. Note: Costs 13 points to use Antidote どくけし Antidote MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Used to heal poisoning . Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It lifts the effect of poison from one Pokémon. Note: Costs 4 points to use Parlyz Heal まひなおし Paralysis Heal MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Used to heal paralysis . Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It eliminates paralysis from a single Pokémon. Note: Costs 4 points to use Awakening ねむけざまし Drowsiness Cure MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Used to wake a sleeping Pokémon up. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It awakens a Pokémon from the clutches of sleep. Note: Costs 4 points to use Burn Heal やけどなおし Burn Heal MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Used to heal a burn . Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It heals a single Pokémon that is suffering from a burn. Note: Costs 4 points to use Ice Heal こおりなおし Ice Heal MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Used to defrost a frozen Pokémon. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It defrosts a Pokémon that has been frozen solid. Note: Costs 4 points to use Full Heal なんでもなおし Heal-All MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Used to heal poison , paralysis , sleep , burn , confusion and freeze . Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It heals all the status problems of a single Pokémon. Note: Costs 6 points to use Revive げんきのかけら Vitality Fragment MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Restores a fainted Pokémon to half of its full HP. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A medicine that revives a fainted Pokémon. It restores half the Pokémon's maximum HP. Note: Costs 11 points to use Max Revive げんきのかたまり Vitality Clump MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Restores a fainted Pokémon, completely restoring its HP. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 A medicine that revives a fainted Pokémon. It fully restores the Pokémon's HP. Note: Costs 14 points to use Ether ピーピーエイド PP Aid MEDICINE pocket INTRODUCED IN GEN I Cannot be bought Cannot be sold Effect: Restores 10 PP of one move. Locations B W Wonder Launcher only B2 W2 Wonder Launcher only Description B W B2 W2 It restores the PP of a Pokémon's selected move by a maximum of 10 points. Note: Costs 12 points to use
